title: putmess
text: putmess Specify the destination of the message frame output. PUTmess off | on Arguments on —send message frame output to the message frame. off —redirect message frame output to the screen. Messages that are normally sent to the message frame appear immediately on the screen. Use ^REFRESH to repaint the screen and remove these messages. Related Links dump Dump ProcScript instructions to the screen or message frame. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
